function solve(s: string): number {

    const n = s.length;

    // Compute prefix_L

    const prefix_L = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute suffix_T

    const suffix_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n-1; i >= 0; i--) {

        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute original_count

    let original_count = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            const l_before = prefix_L[i]; // number of L's before the C (i-th character)

            const t_after = suffix_T[i+1]; // number of T's after the C

            original_count += l_before * t_after;

        }

    }

    // Compute insert_L_increase: sum of suffix_T[i+1] for all C's

    let insert_L_increase = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            insert_L_increase += suffix_T[i+1];

        }

    }

    // Compute insert_T_increase: sum of prefix_L[i] for all C's

    let insert_T_increase = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            insert_T_increase += prefix_L[i];

        }

    }

    // Compute insert_C_increase: max of prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i] for i from 0 to n

    let insert_C_increase = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        const val = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i];

        if (val > insert_C_increase) {

            insert_C_increase = val;

        }

    }

    // Now, the maximum possible increase is the max of the three

    const max_increase = Math.max(insert_L_increase, insert_T_increase, insert_C_increase);

    return original_count + max_increase;

}

function solve(s: string): number {

    const n = s.length;

    // Compute prefix_L

    const prefix_L = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        prefix_L[i+1] = prefix_L[i] + (s[i] === 'L' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute suffix_T

    const suffix_T = new Array(n + 1).fill(0);

    for (let i = n-1; i >= 0; i--) {

        suffix_T[i] = suffix_T[i+1] + (s[i] === 'T' ? 1 : 0);

    }

    // Compute original_count

    let original_count = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            const l_before = prefix_L[i]; // number of L's before the C (i-th character)

            const t_after = suffix_T[i+1]; // number of T's after the C

            original_count += l_before * t_after;

        }

    }

    // Compute insert_L_increase: sum of suffix_T[i+1] for all C's

    let insert_L_increase = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            insert_L_increase += suffix_T[i+1];

        }

    }

    // Compute insert_T_increase: sum of prefix_L[i] for all C's

    let insert_T_increase = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i < n; i++) {

        if (s[i] === 'C') {

            insert_T_increase += prefix_L[i];

        }

    }

    // Compute insert_C_increase: max of prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i] for i from 0 to n

    let insert_C_increase = 0;

    for (let i = 0; i <= n; i++) {

        const val = prefix_L[i] * suffix_T[i];

        if (val > insert_C_increase) {

            insert_C_increase = val;

        }

    }

    // Now, the maximum possible increase is the max of the three

    const max_increase = Math.max(insert_L_increase, insert_T_increase, insert_C_increase);

    return original_count + max_increase;

}
